issues.title: chrome_extension exceeds Source field max_length
issues.attack: "chrome_extension" is 16 chars but Candidate.source max_length=15
issues.response: Use CHROME_EXT = "chrome_ext" to fit within current max_length

issues.title: /api/ URL namespace doesn't exist in project
issues.attack: Spec invents /api/extension/ but main urls.py has no /api/ prefix
issues.response: Place endpoints under /candidates/extension/ or define new /api/ namespace explicitly

issues.title: API token auth system doesn't exist
issues.attack: Spec mentions API tokens but project has no token auth system
issues.response: Remove API token, use session-based auth only with CSRF/cookie handling

issues.title: Cross-origin session auth underspecified
issues.attack: Extension calling Django needs CSRF/CORS/cookie details specified
issues.response: Add CSRF strategy, SameSite cookie config, credentials:include to spec

issues.title: Multi-tenancy organization scoping missing from all APIs
issues.attack: No owned_by org filtering in save/search/duplicate flows
issues.response: All APIs derive org from request.user, filter/create with owned_by

issues.title: Duplicate merge contradicts existing identity policy
issues.attack: Spec uses name+company auto-merge but policy is email/phone only
issues.response: Auto-merge on email/phone/external URL only. Name+company = possible match, needs user confirmation

issues.title: No persistence model for external profile URLs
issues.attack: No field exists to store LinkedIn URL for duplicate detection
issues.response: Add external_profile_url field to Candidate with unique constraint per org

issues.title: api app conflicts with existing app structure
issues.attack: New top-level api/ when everything lives in candidates/
issues.response: Move all extension code under candidates/ (views_extension.py, etc.)

issues.title: New duplicate service instead of extending existing identity service
issues.attack: Creates duplicate.py instead of extending candidate_identity.py
issues.response: Extend candidate_identity.py with identify_candidate_from_extension()

issues.title: Search endpoint lacks access control, pagination, rate limits
issues.attack: No tenant filtering, pagination, or result limits
issues.response: Add login_required, org filtering, pagination (20/page), min query length

issues.title: Server-updated selectors lack endpoint/schema/versioning
issues.attack: No API endpoint, JSON schema, or cache/versioning plan defined
issues.response: Defer to Phase 2. V1 bundles selectors in extension code. Competitors also use extension updates for selectors.

issues.title: Extension permission model missing from manifest
issues.attack: No host_permissions or content_scripts.matches specified
issues.response: Add exact host patterns for LinkedIn, JobKorea, Saramin, synco server

issues.title: No guardrails for LinkedIn TOS compliance
issues.attack: No anti-bulk-scraping protections defined
issues.response: Add explicit user click per save, no auto-save/crawling, per-user throttle, audit log

issues.title: Privacy/consent handling deferred despite storing personal data
issues.attack: No consent_status tracking at creation time
issues.response: Add consent_status=not_requested at creation + source metadata. Full consent workflow out of scope.

issues.title: Update pipeline can overwrite curated data
issues.attack: No diff review or confirmation before destructive changes
issues.response: Updates additive by default, show diff, require confirmation for field changes

issues.title: Career/Education merge semantics undefined
issues.attack: No identity keys, conflict handling, or idempotency rules
issues.response: Define Career identity=(company, start_date), Education=(institution, degree). New records added, existing not modified without confirmation.

issues.title: Duplicate-check endpoint leaks candidate existence
issues.attack: Enumeration vector without rate limits or tenant scoping
issues.response: Add org scoping, rate limiting, minimal data response

issues.title: No error handling contract for API responses
issues.attack: No status codes or response shapes defined
issues.response: Define standard JSON responses: 200/201/400/401/403/409/500

issues.title: Data validation too vague for untrusted scraped data
issues.attack: No max lengths, required fields, HTML stripping, payload limits
issues.response: Define required fields, max lengths, HTML stripping, payload/array limits

issues.title: LinkedIn DOM selectors brittle with no fallback
issues.attack: Generic selectors, no localization/dynamic page handling
issues.response: Acknowledge fragility, add graceful degradation (partial results + confidence), user reviews before save. Inherent to DOM scraping.

issues.title: No distinction between profile pages and search result pages
issues.attack: Different data completeness per page type not addressed
issues.response: Define supported page types: LinkedIn /in/* only, JobKorea/Saramin both. Min required fields for save.

issues.title: No audit trail for sourcing/updating
issues.attack: No created_by/updated_by or import event logging
issues.response: Add extension save event log with user, org, source_site, source_url, timestamp

issues.title: No idempotency/concurrency handling
issues.attack: Double-clicks or simultaneous saves can create duplicates
issues.response: Use transaction.atomic() + unique constraint on (owned_by, external_profile_url)

issues.title: Popup counters require unspecified APIs
issues.attack: 최근 저장, 오늘 N명, 총 DB need endpoints or local storage
issues.response: 최근 저장/오늘 = local chrome.storage. 총 DB = server endpoint (org-scoped).

issues.title: Django REST views ambiguous (DRF vs plain JsonResponse)
issues.attack: DRF not in project dependencies
issues.response: Clarify: plain Django views returning JsonResponse, no DRF

issues.title: Chrome Web Store deliverable underspecified
issues.attack: Distribution mode, privacy policy, permission justification missing
issues.response: Note as unlisted/private for initial release. Privacy policy required. Severity → MINOR (deployment concern, not architecture).

issues.title: Remote selector config could become remote code
issues.attack: Chrome extension policies restrict remotely hosted code
issues.response: Merged with Issue 11 — remote selectors deferred to Phase 2, eliminating this risk for v1

issues.title: No specification for synco server URL
issues.attack: Base URL configuration missing
issues.response: Add options page with server URL input, build-time default for production

issues.title: No observability/debugging for parser failures
issues.attack: No diagnostics, logs, or error reporting mechanism
issues.response: Add parse_quality indicator, server-side structured logging, user-friendly errors. Full observability system out of scope.

issues.title: Tests are acceptance-level only
issues.attack: No reproducible tests for duplicate logic, tenant scoping, validation
issues.response: Add Django unit tests for auth, tenant, duplicate, validation, idempotency + parser fixture tests

issues.title: ExtractionLog.actor/details fields don't exist
issues.attack: Plan uses actor=user, details={...} but model lacks these fields
issues.response: Add actor (FK User, SET_NULL) and details (JSONField) to ExtractionLog with migration

issues.title: @login_required returns 302, not JSON 401
issues.attack: Extension gets HTML redirect instead of JSON error
issues.response: Custom extension_login_required decorator returning JsonResponse 401

issues.title: Education year fields passed as strings to IntegerField
issues.attack: Parser strings like '' or '2020년' crash on DB save
issues.response: Add parse_int_or_none() helper, apply to year fields

issues.title: CSRF trusted origins wildcard not workable
issues.attack: chrome-extension://* doesn't match Django's wildcard semantics
issues.response: Use @csrf_exempt on extension views + custom auth decorator with session check

issues.title: SameSite=Lax blocks cross-origin cookies
issues.attack: Session cookies not sent from extension origin
issues.response: Document production requirement: SameSite=None; Secure via env settings

issues.title: consent_status default mismatch
issues.attack: Model default='' vs spec default='not_requested'
issues.response: Change model default to 'not_requested'

issues.title: Update mode drops new_careers_confirmed
issues.attack: Validator doesn't preserve new_careers_confirmed field
issues.response: Add to validator with same structure validation as careers

issues.title: None becomes literal 'None' string
issues.attack: str(None) passes name validation
issues.response: Add safe_str() helper returning '' for None

issues.title: Phone excluded from secondary identifier check
issues.attack: Valid name+phone profile rejected despite phone being duplicate key
issues.response: Include normalized phone (len>=10) in secondary check

issues.title: JSON parse and pagination errors return 500
issues.attack: No try/except around json.loads() or int() for page
issues.response: Wrap all JSON parse, validate/clamp page >= 1

issues.title: external_profile_url not in update allowed fields
issues.attack: Email/phone matched candidate can't gain URL on update
issues.response: Add to allowed_fields with normalization and IntegrityError handling

issues.title: Concurrent email/phone duplicates not protected
issues.attack: Only URL has unique constraint, email/phone can race
issues.response: Use select_for_update() in identity check. Unique constraints unsafe for email/phone due to blank values.

issues.title: Rate limit uses LocMemCache (unreliable multi-worker)
issues.attack: Per-process LocMemCache resets counters across workers
issues.response: Use DB-backed counter: ExtractionLog.filter(action=EXTENSION_SAVE, created_at__date=today).count()

issues.title: check-duplicate doesn't return diff but client expects it
issues.attack: Content script calls dupResult.data.diff but endpoint doesn't compute it
issues.response: Change client flow: check-duplicate lightweight, save-profile returns diff on update click

issues.title: Education merge/update missing
issues.attack: Only career diff/update, education ignored
issues.response: Add education diff using (institution, degree) key and update in _handle_update

issues.title: Nested arrays not element-validated
issues.attack: List items could be strings/nulls causing AttributeError
issues.response: Validate each item is dict, skip non-dict, sanitize in serializer
